title: Post Fixture Executive
description:
Key Responsibilities

Post-Fixture & Charter Party Administration

  • Review and administer charter parties following fixture, ensuring compliance with agreed commercial terms
  • Circulate fixture recaps and charter party documentation to internal stakeholders
  • Act as the primary point of contact for assigned voyages on post-fixture matters

Voyage Execution and Coordination

  • Coordinate voyage execution with vessel operations, technical, and marine assurance teams
  • Liaise with charterers, brokers, agents, and terminals on voyage orders, port nominations, and operational matters
  • Monitor cargo readiness, tank preparation, and segregation requirements in accordance with charter party and cargo specifications Laytime, Demurrage, and Commercial Control
  • Track Notices of Readiness, Statements of Facts, and port activities
  • Prepare laytime calculations and demurrage or despatch statements
  • Support the handling and resolution of commercial claims, escalating complex matters when required

Documentation and Compliance

  • Oversee voyage documentation including Bills of Lading, cargo documentation, and Letters of Indemnity where applicable
  • Ensure documentation accuracy and alignment with charter party terms and regulatory requirements
  • Support compliance with MPA regulations and industry standards relevant to chemical tankers, biofuels, and methanol

Financial and Internal Coordination

  • Coordinate with finance and accounts on freight invoicing and demurrage recovery
  • Monitor voyage performance and highlight potential commercial or operational risks

Requirements and Experience

  • Diploma or degree in Maritime Studies, Nautical Studies, Shipping, Logistics, or a related discipline
  • Prior experience in post-fixture operations, tanker operations, or chartering support within a shipping or marine fuel environment
  • Working knowledge of voyage charter parties, laytime calculations, and basic demurrage handling
  • Exposure to chemical tankers, biofuels, methanol, or alternative fuels is an advantage but not mandatory
  • Ability to manage assigned voyages independently with good judgement and attention to detail
  • Strong organisational skills and ability to work effectively in a fast-paced operational environment
  • Clear written and verbal communication skills

districts.location: D23 Hillview, Dairy Farm, Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang
